extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AART Wout won from late breakaway remnants after BOASSON HAGEN and SCHILLBACHER nearly held off peloton inside final kilometer
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-Quickstep controlled early but Bora-Hansgrohe mistimed sprint leadout starting at 4km instead of required 2km Bennett specified
BOASSON HAGEN and SCHILLBACHER counterattacked inside 1.5km when peloton neutralized TAMAKI, exploiting technical corners before final straight
VAN AART delivered sprint from third wheel position after ALA PHILIPPE opened too early from breakaway chase group

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: specified team needed front at 2km but Bora-Hansgrohe went 4km out and lost control allowing late counterattacks
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: positive: nearly stole stage with late acceleration after five-hour breakaway effort, showed dimension data willing to gamble
rider_signals.TAMAKI Yuma: neutral: launched multiple late attacks 2-1.5km out that forced counterattacks but lacked final acceleration to hold
rider_signals.ALA PHILIPPE Julian: negative: opened sprint from breakaway chase too early allowing van Aart to come over him
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: team conserved energy intentionally on flat stage awaiting mountain terrain tomorrow
